extension.summary: Fen Light test build with bundled selector-backed subtitle autoplay ranking.
extension.description: This test add-on bundles the subtitle selector directly into Fen Light so autoplay can rank source and subtitle compatibility in one local pass. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news:
[v2.0.24]: * Prefer direct subtitle filename evidence over uploader comments when both are available. * Strip OpenSubtitles track and language suffixes before source/subtitle matching.
[v2.0.23]: * Bundle the subtitle selector inside the add-on for self-contained test builds. * Use one title-level subtitle gather to build a selector-backed autoplay retry pool.
INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.
